brief: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods and launches strikes on Iran, while UK's new PM Burnham forms his cabinet. Research explores AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
news_summary: Trump escalates trade war with 50% tariff on Canadian goods and military strikes on Iran; UK's Burnham takes office with cabinet picks; NYC attack suspect targeted ICE.
papers_summary: Studies examine AI feedback in writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, and debris tracking in hypervelocity impacts, alongside second language writing and children's multimodality.

en.brief: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods and launches strikes on Iran, while UK's new PM Burnham forms his cabinet. Research explores AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
en.news_summary: Trump escalates trade war with 50% tariff on Canadian goods and military strikes on Iran; UK's Burnham takes office with cabinet picks; NYC attack suspect targeted ICE.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine AI feedback in writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, and debris tracking in hypervelocity impacts, alongside second language writing and children's multimodality.

zh.brief: 英国新任首相贝安德（Andy Burnham）就职，对华政策引发关注；美国宣布对加拿大商品加征50%关税，贸易紧张升级。2026年世界杯落幕，争议不断。研究方面无中文论文专题，英文论文聚焦写作教学与AI反馈。
zh.news_summary: 英国工党领袖贝安德接任首相，其大曼城市长背景预示对华务实路线；美国对加拿大实施50%关税，加剧北美贸易摩擦；世界杯决赛西班牙加时胜阿根廷夺冠，但扩军与政治干预争议持续。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先中文研究论文。英文论文探讨AI在写作反馈中的应用、可视化素养及儿童跨模态写作等课题。

todays_image.caption: The ax, a tool for shaping wood, is ironically wielded as a blunt instrument in proposing tariffs to combat wildfire smoke, mirroring how the solution misdirects blame from the actual source of the fires.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: American Woodmen ax owned by George W. Ross
